findings.description: Section s2 content explicitly mentions `RuntimeException` and `Error` as the only exception types that `handle()` can throw (both in code comments and in prose), but neither PascalCase class name appears in the hints array.
findings.source_evidence: Code comment: `// 実行時例外(java.lang.RuntimeException)もしくは、// エラー(java.lang.Error) のいずれかが送出される。` and `// 通常の用途ではjava.lang.Errorを捕捉する必要はない。`
